plugins.name: visual-explainer
plugins.description: Generate beautiful, self-contained HTML pages that visually explain systems, code changes, plans, and data. 8 commands including diff-review, plan-review, project-recap, slides, and a full brainstorm-design-generate pipeline.

plugins.name: agent-commands
plugins.description: Slash commands to invoke agents that lack their own commands. Covers brand-guardian, ceo-quality-controller, mobile-ux-optimizer, ux-researcher, visual-storyteller, and accessibility-expert.
